items.title: International Business Machines Corporation (IBM) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
IBM (IBM) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
items.description: Arvind Krishna: Thank you for joining us today.  As we laid out at our Investor Day in February 2025, we are executing on our strategy to advance IBM as a software-led hybrid cloud and AI platform company.

items.title: Why IBM Stock Is Soaring in After-Hours Trading
items.description: The company beat analysts' Q4 2025 expectations, but it's the company's 2026 expectations that also has investors excited.

items.title: IBM (IBM) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
items.description: IBM (IBM) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +4.39% and +2.53%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2025. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

items.title: IBM, ServiceNow, Southwest: Earnings roundup
items.description: A number of companies reported earnings after the market close on Wednesday, Jan 28, including IBM (IBM), ServiceNow (NOW), and Southwest Airlines (LUV). Asking for a Trend Anchor Josh Lipton recaps the reports.To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Asking for a Trend.
